overall.description: First-person exploration of an abandoned, neon-lit cyberpunk shopping mall from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player ascends an escalator and walks through derelict corridors past arcade machines, vending machines, and empty storefronts before entering back storage areas. The environment features purple and green neon lighting, debris, and a haunting, deserted atmosphere.

events.description: reaches top of escalator and steps onto upper level platform

agents.ego_description: riding the escalator upward while looking forward toward the upper level entrance

entered.detail: metal escalator steps with purple side lighting moving upward
black rubber handrail with silver trim on left side
black rubber handrail with silver trim on right side
green neon tube lighting along the upper level ceiling
dimly lit platform at the top of the escalator with debris

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up an escalator in an abandoned cyberpunk mall. Green neon lights illuminate the shaft while the camera moves steadily upward, arriving at a debris-strewn upper level landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned upper mall corridor with arcade machines

events.description: turns right off escalator platform into main mall corridor with arcade machines
passing under brighter ceiling lights near the TURBO sign, illumination shifts from purple to white

agents.ego_description: walking through the deserted mall corridor, glancing at abandoned arcade machines and mannequins

entered.detail: vintage arcade cabinet with teal casing and dark screen
white plastic mannequin standing near a debris pile
large square concrete support column with metallic trim
large illuminated sign with red and blue neon letters spelling TURBO
tall glass windows showing dark exterior cityscape

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the escalator, the camera turns into a wide mall corridor lined with abandoned arcade machines and eerie white mannequins. The carpeted floor is littered with debris, and a prominent neon 'TURBO' sign glows on the right wall as the camera passes by glass windows looking out into the dark city.

scene_state.functional_zone: main mall walkway with vending machines and digital advertisements

events.description: approaching large golden SALE banner hanging over broken escalator shaft
navigates around the SALE banner structure, turning slightly left

agents.ego_description: continuing through the mall interior, passing rows of vending machines and illuminated advertisements

entered.detail: large red automated vending machine with glowing product display
massive hanging banner with gold letters spelling SALE over a derelict escalator
illuminated billboard showing product advertisements with blue and white lighting
large palm plant in planter, one of the few living elements in the scene

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the abandoned mall, passing glowing vending machines and digital advertisement screens. A massive golden 'SALE' banner dominates the view, hanging over a ruined escalator shaft. The environment remains deserted with debris scattered across the carpeted floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: back storage rooms and service corridors

events.description: enters dark back storage room with metal shelving units from the main mall corridor
moving into very dark service corridor with only distant light visible at the end

agents.ego_description: leaving the public mall area and entering restricted back rooms with storage shelves and industrial crates

entered.detail: tall empty metal storage racks with white and blue paint
large black and yellow plastic storage containers stacked on the floor
narrow unlit service corridor leading to a distant light source
scattered cardboard boxes and debris on concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions from the public mall into restricted back areas. The camera enters a storage room filled with empty metal shelving units and industrial crates, then proceeds into a dark, narrow service corridor lit only by a distant exit light, creating a tense, claustrophobic atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that ascends from a neon-lit mall atrium into the claustrophobic depths of a restricted service area. It begins with a steady climb up an escalator bathed in green neon light, arriving at a debris-strewn upper landing. As the camera moves forward, the space opens into a wide corridor lined with abandoned arcade machines, eerie mannequins, and a glowing TURBO sign before passing digital advertisements and a massive golden SALE banner hanging over a ruined shaft. The scene then shifts from the public ruins into a restricted storage room filled with metal shelving and industrial crates. Finally, the camera pushes into a dark, narrow service corridor lit only by a distant exit light, completing the transition from an expansive commercial wasteland to a tense, enclosed industrial space.
